characters.name: Cheryl
characters.description: CherylGenderFemaleSpeciesHumanAppearancesFirst appearanceGrim on VacationVoiced byCandi Milo Cherylis a character ofNew Looney Tunes. She is the spouse of Carl, and her only appearance is in the episodeGrim on Vacation. Cheryl is a woman who has brown hair, red headband, wears sunglasses, yellow ear rings, and wears a one-piece red bathing suit.

characters.name: Claudette Dupri
characters.description: Claudette DupriGenderFemaleSpeciesRed FoxAppearancesFirst appearanceThe Spy Who Bugged MeLast appearanceUndercover BunnyNumber of appearances10InteractionsFriendsPierre,Pepé Le PewEnemiesBugs BunnyVoiced byKath Soucie Claudette Dupriis a character inNew Looney Tunes. Bugs Bunnyvisits Washington, D.C. on a vacation. During this time, he is followed by Claudette, who is under orders from her associate/superior Pierre to obtain secret plans to benefit the French government. Due to a switch by a plainclothes Secret Service agent, Claudette is led to believe that the bag in Bugs' possession contains the plans. Thus, she spends a majority of the episode trying to obtain his bag. After a series of failed attempts, she outright steals the bag, but her escape attempt ties her to the Washington Monument. Enraged, Claudette tries to kill Bugs with a laser, which is deflected off the Lincoln Memorial and strikes her. Annoyed with her actions, the statue of Abraham Lincoln comes to life and kicks her clear out of D.C.

characters.name: Daffy Duck
characters.description: Daffy DuckGenderMaleSpeciesAmerican Black DuckAppearancesFirst appearancePorky's Duck-Livery ServiceLast appearanceThe Legend of Burrito MondayNumber of appearances83InteractionsFriendsBugs BunnyPorky PigRed OmahaEnemiesCalSir LittlechinShameless O'ScantyLeslie P. LilylegsFoghorn LeghornElmer FuddGrannyTweetyViktorMarvin the MartianThesTad TuckerCurt and Punkinhead MartinBearBugs Bunny(sometimes)Voiced byDee Bradley Baker Daffy Duckis one of the four main characters inNew Looney Tunes. Daffy is an American black duck[1]with yellow webbed feet and a yellow beak. BecauseWabbit/New Looney Tunespays homage to the classic cartoons of the 1930s-1950s, unlike previous incarnations of Daffy on previous reboots, this Daffy returns to his classic-zany self as seen in his early appearances.

characters.name: Duncan the Bird
characters.description: Duncan the BirdGenderMaleSpeciesBirdAppearancesFirst appearanceBig TroublesLast appearanceTBANumber of appearances1InteractionsFriendsSqueaks the Squirrel(formerly)EnemiesBugs Bunny,Squeaks the Squirrel, Bird PoliceVoiced byDrew Nelson Duncan the Birdis a character who appeared inNew Looney Tunes. Duncan is a woodpecker. He has a red head, with a yellow beak, a white chin, and black feathers. He has an flag tail, a black body, yellow bird feet, and white lines next to his feet.
